CLEAN_CUT.title: CLEAN CUT
text: The lake is closed again.
Downtown is half-boarded, but the water is finally clearing.
You told the truth and paid in full.
Nobody thanked you for it.
That's usually how it goes.

FUNCTIONAL_MASK.title: FUNCTIONAL MASK
text: The lake reopens under enhanced monitoring.
Frothy PR videos. Carefully worded advisories.
A few dead fish, if you know where to look.
People still ski. Still post selfies.
Reality and branding hold an uneasy truce.

COLLAPSE.title: COLLAPSE
text: The sirens go off at dusk and don't stop.
Dead fish wash up faster than anyone can count them.
Someone's lie meets someone else's lie at the shoreline, and neither one holds.
Lake Ulysses doesn't reopen. It doesn't stay closed either.
Nobody's in charge of what happens next.

LIVING_LIE.title: LIVING LIE
text: The lake reopens under enhanced monitoring.
Influencers pose near green water.
Dead fish are edited out of the photos.
The app has a 4.8 rating.
Your personal life is stable. Your integrity bar is dust.
The lake looks beautiful today.
